signature_wines.name: Clos Sainte-Hune
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling (single-vineyard)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Trimbach's 1.67 hectare monopole inside Grand Cru Rosacker, declassified to Alsace AOC. Piercing dry Riesling that needs a decade to unwind into wax, citrus and Vosges granite salinity. Source: Trimbach producer page.
signature_wines.description: Trimbach's 1.67 hectare walled monopole inside Grand Cru Rosacker, family-declassified to Alsace AOC. The benchmark for dry, ageworthy Alsace Riesling.

signature_wines.name: Cuvee Frederic Emile Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling (Grand Cru blend)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Trimbach's flagship Riesling, a Geisberg and Osterberg Grand Cru parcel blend released after years of bottle age. Smoky, structured, ageworthy. Source: Trimbach producer page.
signature_wines.description: Trimbach's flagship cuvee, a Riesling blend of Grand Cru Geisberg and Osterberg parcels released after several years of bottle age. Smoky, structured and ageworthy.

signature_wines.name: Hugel Schoelhammer Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling (single-parcel)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: A single 0.45 hectare parcel inside Schoenenbourg, declassified to Alsace AOC. Hugel's flagship dry Riesling, released as a multi-decade vintage statement. Source: Hugel producer page.
signature_wines.description: Hugel's flagship single-parcel Schoenenbourg Riesling, declassified to Alsace AOC. Yellow plum, preserved lemon and limestone built for a 20-year cellar.

signature_wines.name: Hugel Selection de Grains Nobles Gewurztraminer
signature_wines.style: botrytised dessert Gewurztraminer (SGN)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Botrytised Gewurztraminer at near-Sauternes ripeness, made only in noble-rot vintages. Saffron honey, candied rose and apricot jam. Source: Hugel producer page.
signature_wines.description: Hugel's botrytised Gewurztraminer at SGN ripeness, made only in noble-rot vintages. Saffron honey, candied rose, apricot jam; a multi-decade dessert wine.

signature_wines.name: Leon Beyer Cuvee des Comtes d Eguisheim Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling (old-vine Pfersigberg fruit)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Beyer's flagship Riesling from old vines on Pfersigberg around Eguisheim, labelled Alsace AOC. Steely, dry, mineral, built for a long cellar. Source: Leon Beyer producer page.
signature_wines.description: Beyer's flagship dry Riesling, sourced from old vines on Pfersigberg around Eguisheim and labelled Alsace AOC. Steely, mineral, built for a 20-year cellar.

signature_wines.name: Leon Beyer Cuvee des Comtes d Eguisheim Gewurztraminer
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Gewurztraminer
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Beyer's flagship dry Gewurztraminer from Eguisheim old plots. Rose, lychee and white pepper, but bone-dry and structured. Source: Leon Beyer producer page.
signature_wines.description: Beyer's flagship dry Gewurztraminer from Eguisheim old plots. Rose, lychee and ginger, but bone-dry and structured; the textbook Alsace dry Gewurz.

signature_wines.name: Schlumberger Kitterle Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling Grand Cru
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Schlumberger's flagship Kitterle Riesling from steep terraced sandstone slopes above Guebwiller. Smoky, dry, structured. Source: Schlumberger producer page.
signature_wines.description: Schlumberger's flagship Kitterle Riesling from steep sandstone terraces above Guebwiller. Smoky stone, lime and structured dryness; a benchmark Grand Cru Riesling.

signature_wines.name: Weinbach Schlossberg Riesling Cuvee Sainte Catherine
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling Grand Cru
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Weinbach's flagship dry Riesling from old vines on Schlossberg granite, picked late on Saint Catherine's Day. The estate's most precise Riesling. Source: Weinbach producer page.
signature_wines.description: Weinbach's flagship dry Riesling from old vines on Schlossberg granite, picked late on Saint Catherine's Day. The estate's most precise Riesling.

signature_wines.name: Weinbach Schlossberg Riesling L Inedit
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling (top single-parcel Schlossberg)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Weinbach's top Schlossberg parcel selection from 1940s-planted vines, made only in vintages that allow concentration with retained acidity. Source: Weinbach producer page.
signature_wines.description: Weinbach's top Schlossberg parcel selection from 1940s-planted vines. Salt, smoke, citrus and racy acid; made only in exceptional vintages.

signature_wines.name: Weinbach Furstentum Gewurztraminer Cuvee Laurence
signature_wines.style: still off-dry Alsace Gewurztraminer Grand Cru
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Weinbach's flagship Gewurztraminer from old vines on Furstentum limestone, named for Laurence Faller. Concentrated rose, lychee and ginger. Source: Weinbach producer page.
signature_wines.description: Weinbach's flagship Gewurztraminer from old vines on Furstentum limestone, named for Laurence Faller. Concentrated rose, lychee and ginger in the off-dry register.

signature_wines.name: Weinbach Altenbourg Pinot Gris Quintessence SGN
signature_wines.style: botrytised dessert Pinot Gris (SGN Quintessence)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Weinbach's top SGN selection from fully botrytised Altenbourg fruit. Saffron honey, candied apricot, marzipan. Source: Weinbach producer page.
signature_wines.description: Weinbach's noble-rot Pinot Gris from Altenbourg, top of the SGN pyramid. Saffron honey, candied apricot and marzipan; a multi-decade dessert wine.

signature_wines.name: Zind Humbrecht Clos Saint Urbain Rangen Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling Grand Cru (volcanic)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Zind-Humbrecht's flagship Riesling from the walled Clos Saint Urbain inside volcanic Grand Cru Rangen. Smoky, intensely mineral. Source: Zind-Humbrecht producer page.
signature_wines.description: Zind-Humbrecht's flagship Riesling from the walled Clos Saint Urbain inside volcanic Grand Cru Rangen. Smoky, mineral, structured; an Alsace flagship dry Riesling.

signature_wines.name: Zind Humbrecht Clos Saint Urbain Rangen Pinot Gris
signature_wines.style: still off-dry Alsace Pinot Gris Grand Cru (volcanic)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Zind-Humbrecht's Clos Saint Urbain Rangen Pinot Gris. Honeyed pear, smoke and granite-mineral grip. Source: Zind-Humbrecht producer page.
signature_wines.description: Zind-Humbrecht's volcanic Pinot Gris from the walled Clos Saint Urbain in Grand Cru Rangen. Honeyed pear, smoke and granite-mineral grip; lightly off-dry.

signature_wines.name: Zind Humbrecht Clos Hauserer Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling (monopole Clos)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Zind-Humbrecht's monopole walled Riesling vineyard below Grand Cru Hengst, on calcareous-marl. Pure dry Riesling. Source: Zind-Humbrecht producer page.
signature_wines.description: Zind-Humbrecht's monopole walled Riesling vineyard below Grand Cru Hengst, on calcareous-marl. Dry, stony, structured; a benchmark Alsace AOC Riesling.

signature_wines.name: Zind Humbrecht Clos Windsbuhl Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling (monopole limestone plateau)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Zind-Humbrecht's Clos Windsbuhl monopole Riesling, high above Hunawihr on Muschelkalk limestone. Cool-climate, structured for the cellar. Source: Zind-Humbrecht producer page.
signature_wines.description: Zind-Humbrecht's Clos Windsbuhl monopole Riesling, high above Hunawihr on Muschelkalk limestone. Slow-developing, cool-climate, structured for the cellar.

signature_wines.name: Zind Humbrecht Brand Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling Grand Cru (granite)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Zind-Humbrecht's Brand Grand Cru Riesling from steep granite above Turckheim. Yellow apple and preserved lemon with racy granite mineral lift. Source: Zind-Humbrecht producer page.
signature_wines.description: Zind-Humbrecht's Brand Grand Cru Riesling from steep granite above Turckheim. Yellow apple and preserved lemon with racy granite mineral lift.

signature_wines.name: Marcel Deiss Mambourg Grand Cru
signature_wines.style: still complanted Alsace Grand Cru (field blend)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Marcel Deiss's flagship complanted Grand Cru, noble grapes co-fermented on Mambourg limestone. Honey and exotic spice with saline finish. Source: Marcel Deiss producer page.
signature_wines.description: Marcel Deiss's complanted Mambourg Grand Cru: noble grapes co-fermented on south-facing limestone. The estate's case for terroir over varietal.

signature_wines.name: Marcel Deiss Altenberg de Bergheim Grand Cru
signature_wines.style: still complanted Alsace Grand Cru (field blend)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Deiss's complanted Altenberg de Bergheim, Riesling-dominant field blend on calcareous slopes. Profound, ageworthy. Source: Marcel Deiss producer page.
signature_wines.description: Deiss's complanted Altenberg de Bergheim Grand Cru, Riesling-dominant field-blend on calcareous slopes. Profound, ageworthy and the case for terroir over varietal.

signature_wines.name: Albert Boxler Sommerberg Riesling E
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling (old-vine parcel selection)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Boxler's E parcel selection on Sommerberg, a 70-year-old vine block on steep south-facing granite. Sharp, mineral. Source: Boxler producer page.
signature_wines.description: Boxler's E parcel Sommerberg Riesling from a 70-year-old vine block on steep south-facing granite. Sharp, mineral and slow-developing; an artisan benchmark.

signature_wines.name: Ostertag Muenchberg Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling Grand Cru (volcanic-sandstone)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Andre Ostertag's Riesling from volcanic-sandstone Muenchberg Grand Cru. Sharp, smoky, structured. Source: Ostertag producer page.
signature_wines.description: Andre Ostertag's flagship Riesling from volcanic-sandstone Muenchberg Grand Cru above Nothalten. Sharp, smoky and structured; a Bas-Rhin masterpiece.

signature_wines.name: Schoffit Clos Saint Theobald Rangen Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling Grand Cru (volcanic)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Schoffit's flagship Riesling from the walled Clos Saint Theobald inside volcanic Grand Cru Rangen. Smoky, intensely mineral. Source: Schoffit producer page.
signature_wines.description: Schoffit's flagship Riesling from the walled Clos Saint Theobald inside volcanic Grand Cru Rangen. Smoky, intensely mineral, multi-decade ageworthy.

signature_wines.name: Albert Mann Pinot Noir Grand H
signature_wines.style: still red Alsace Pinot Noir (old-vine Hengst)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Albert Mann's top Pinot Noir from old vines on Grand Cru Hengst, biodynamic. Burgundian register cherry and forest floor. Source: Albert Mann producer page.
signature_wines.description: Albert Mann's top Pinot Noir from old vines on Grand Cru Hengst, biodynamic. Burgundian register cherry and forest floor with soft tannin and high acid.

signature_wines.name: Marc Kreydenweiss Kastelberg Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Alsace Riesling Grand Cru (Steige schist)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Marc Kreydenweiss's Kastelberg Riesling from Steige schist above Andlau. Biodynamic since 1989; smoky, dry, structured. Source: Kreydenweiss producer page.
signature_wines.description: Marc Kreydenweiss's biodynamic flagship Riesling from Kastelberg Steige-schist above Andlau. Smoky, dry, structured; a 1989 biodynamic pioneer.

signature_wines.name: Barmes Buecher Cremant d Alsace Extra Brut
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Cremant d Alsace (vintage)
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Barmes-Buecher's vintage-dated extra-brut Cremant. Long-aged on lees, biodynamic, often zero-dosage. Source: Barmes-Buecher producer page.
signature_wines.description: Barmes-Buecher's biodynamic vintage-dated extra-brut Cremant d Alsace. Long-aged on lees, often zero-dosage; one of the region's serious sparkling cuvees.
